headline: It’s Not a One-Off. The Lingo All of Corporate America Has Suddenly Started Using.
summary: Barron’s reviewed the use of a certain sentence structure in corporate communications. Much of it had a familiar ring.

headline: Stifel Maintains Buy on A.O. Smith, Lowers Price Target to $78
summary: Stifel  analyst Nathan Jones   maintains A.O. Smith (NYSE:AOS) with a Buy and lowers the price target from $85 to $78.

headline: 1 Profitable Stock to Own for Decades and 2 That Underwhelm
summary: While profitability is essential, it doesn’t guarantee long-term success. Some companies that rest on their margins will lose ground as competition intensifies - as Jeff Bezos said, "Your margin is my opportunity".

raw.headline: 1 Profitable Stock to Own for Decades and 2 That Underwhelm
